mapper.update: UPDATE comment /* 댓글 테이블 */ SET group_id = #{commentId} /* 댓글 그룹 ID */ WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} /* 댓글 키 */
mapper.select:
SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId /* 댓글 키 */ , c.note_id AS noteId /* 테이스팅 노트 키 */ , c.user_id AS userId /* 회원 키 */ , c.parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId /* 부모 댓글 키 */ , c.group_id AS groupId /* 댓글 그룹 ID */ , c.depth /* 댓글 깊이 */ , c.content /* 댓글 내용 */ , c.created_at AS createdAt /* 등록 일시 */ , c.updated_at AS updatedAt /* 수정 일시 */ , c.is_deleted AS isDeleted /* 삭제 여부 */ , CASE WHEN u.is_deleted = 'Y' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE u.name END AS userName /* 회원 이름 */ , u.login_id AS loginId /* 회원 로그인 ID */ , (r.obj_id IS NOT NULL) AS reported , 'COMMENT' AS objType
FROM comment c /* 댓글 테이블 */
LEFT JOIN user u /* 회원 테이블 */ ON c.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT obj_id FROM report /* 신고 테이블 */ WHERE obj_type = 'COMMENT' AND status_code = 'COMPLETED' AND is_deleted = 'N' ) r ON r.obj_id = c.comment_id
WHERE c.note_id = #{noteId}
ORDER BY c.group_id ASC , c.created_at ASC

SELECT comment_id AS commentId /* 댓글 키 */ , note_id AS noteId /* 테이스팅 노트 키 */ , user_id AS userId /* 회원 키 */ , parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId /* 부모 댓글 키 */ , group_id AS groupId /* 댓글 그룹 ID */ , depth /* 댓글 깊이 */ , content /* 댓글 내용 */ , created_at AS createdAt /* 등록 일시 */ , updated_at AS updatedAt /* 수정 일시 */ , is_deleted AS isDeleted /* 삭제 여부 */ FROM comment /* 댓글 테이블 */ WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment /* 댓글 테이블 */ SET is_deleted = 'Y' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment /* 댓글 테이블 */ SET is_deleted = 'Y' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id AS commentId , note_id AS noteId , parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId , group_id AS groupId , depth , user_id AS userId , content , is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
